# Prompting agents II: web search and specification

<!-- source: 07-ai-powered-analysis-workflows.qmd section "Web search" +
     09-specification-sheets.qmd README/AGENTS.md concept (light touch; full spec
     sheet detail lives in Section 3 module 04) -->

Using web search to gather domain knowledge, and a first look at specification-sheet-style prompting.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge using a web-search prompt to find a stats method, then verifying it.
:::
